hooks.command: if command -v bd >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -d .beads ]; then echo '=== bd ready (top 5) ==='; bd ready --limit 5 2>/dev/null || true; echo '---'; echo 'actor: '"${BEADS_ACTOR:-unset}"; echo 'protocol: docs/beads-agent-protocol.md'; else echo 'bd not installed or repo not initialized — see docs/beads-agent-protocol.md'; fi
